public void applyPolicy ( String policySetting , Properties request , File localFile ) throws PolicyViolationException , PolicyConfigurationException { if ( ! StringUtils . equals ( request . getProperty ( "filetype" ) , "artifact" ) ) { return ; } String version = request . getProperty ( "version" , "" ) ; boolean isSnapshotVersion = false ; if ( StringUtils . isNotBlank ( version ) ) { isSnapshotVersion = VersionUtil . isSnapshot ( version ) ; } if ( ! options . contains ( policySetting ) ) { throw new PolicyConfigurationException ( "Unknown " + getUpdateMode ( ) + " policy setting [" + policySetting + "], valid settings are [" + StringUtils . join ( options . iterator ( ) , "," ) + "]" ) ; } if ( ALWAYS . equals ( policySetting ) ) { log . debug ( "OK to update, {} policy set to ALWAYS." , getUpdateMode ( ) ) ; return ; } if ( ! isSnapshotVersion && isSnapshotPolicy ( ) ) { log . debug ( "OK to update, snapshot policy does not apply for non-snapshot versions." ) ; return ; } if ( isSnapshotVersion && ! isSnapshotPolicy ( ) ) { log . debug ( "OK to update, release policy does not apply for snapshot versions." ) ; return ; } if ( NEVER . equals ( policySetting ) ) { throw new PolicyViolationException ( "NO to update, " + getUpdateMode ( ) + " policy set to NEVER." ) ; } if ( ! localFile . exists ( ) ) { log . debug ( "OK to update {}, local file does not exist." , getUpdateMode ( ) ) ; return ; } if ( ONCE . equals ( policySetting ) ) { throw new PolicyViolationException ( "NO to update " + getUpdateMode ( ) + ", policy is ONCE, and local file exist." ) ; } if ( DAILY . equals ( policySetting ) ) { Calendar cal = Calendar . getInstance ( ) ; cal . add ( Calendar . DAY_OF_MONTH , - 1 ) ; Calendar fileCal = Calendar . getInstance ( ) ; fileCal . setTimeInMillis ( localFile . lastModified ( ) ) ; if ( cal . after ( fileCal ) ) { return ; } else { throw new PolicyViolationException ( "NO to update " + getUpdateMode ( ) + ", policy is DAILY, local file exist, and has been updated within the last day." ) ; } } if ( HOURLY . equals ( policySetting ) ) { Calendar cal = Calendar . getInstance ( ) ; cal . add ( Calendar . HOUR , - 1 ) ; Calendar fileCal = Calendar . getInstance ( ) ; fileCal . setTimeInMillis ( localFile . lastModified ( ) ) ; if ( cal . after ( fileCal ) ) { return ; } else { throw new PolicyViolationException ( "NO to update " + getUpdateMode ( ) + ", policy is HOURLY, local file exist, and has been updated within the last hour." ) ; } } throw new PolicyConfigurationException ( "Unable to process " + getUpdateMode ( ) + " policy of [" + policySetting + "], please file a bug report." ) ; }
